channel.title: Adb命令 - Tag - 编程心语
channel.description: Adb命令 - Tag - 编程心语

item.title: adb命令大全
item.author: Simon Chen
item.description: Android Debug Bridge version 1.0.29 -d – directs command to the only connected USB device returns an error if more than one USB device is present. -e – directs command to the only running emulator. returns an error if more than one emulator is running. -s – directs command to the USB device or emulator with the given serial number. Overrides ANDROID_SERIAL environment variable. -p – simple product name like
